## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Keep it brief (1-3 sentences). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactor / code quality improvement
- [ ] Documentation / tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added / updated and all pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Bundle size impact checked (`npm run check:size` — after `npm run build`)
- [ ] Existing component API is backward-compatible (or documented as breaking)
- [ ] Accessibility: new interactive components have ARIA attributes + keyboard navigation
- [ ] RTL: new CSS uses logical properties (`padding-inline-*`, `border-inline-*`, `inset-inline-*`)
- [ ] No hardcoded colours, spacing, or other design tokens (use CSS variables)
